species: This study employed a comprehensive proteomic and transcriptomic approach to investigate the composition and molecular signatures of EVs isolated from human seminal plasma.
tissue: EVs isolated from human seminal plasma.
cell_type: the proteins involved in reproduction-related processes such a spermatogenesis, motility and copulation, male sex differentiation, and progesterone signalling.
disease_state: 12 semen samples with a total absence of spermatozoa (Azoospermia = AZO)
sample_source: Semen samples were collected from subjects undergoing semen analysis at the Unit of Medically Assisted Reproduction.
age: The mean age was 36.2 ± 6.3 years (range: 20–45 years);
BMI: the BMI ranged between 18 and 25 (normal weight).
sex: Seminal fluids were collected from adult men with Normozoospermia.
